case_title: DE ANGELIS, JAMES vs. KEOWN, DON IND & DBA GRAY DERBY RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE ANGELIS, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT KEOWN, DON IND & DBA GRAY DERBY RESTAURANT
